title: EarthSight: A Distributed Framework for Low-Latency Satellite Intelligence
short_description: Reproducibility artifact for EarthSight (MLSys 2026), a distributed runtime for satellite image intelligence.
description: Simulation framework for EarthSight, a distributed runtime system that reduces satellite imagery delivery latency by performing on-board ML inference coordinated with ground-station scheduling. Reproduces average compute time per image by 1.9x and lowers 90th percentile end-to-end latency.

hardware_requirements.description: Hard requirement: 256 GB RAM for simulation jobs. Can be run on a single machine serially or on a SLURM-managed HPC cluster for parallel execution.
